leadText: Prosciutto (Japanese: なまハム Raw Ham) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This ingredient is very salty like regular ham, but the difference is prosciutto is not cooked after it is cured, giving it a fun freshness.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 200 $ 50 Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This ingredient is very salty like regular ham, but the difference is prosciutto is not cooked after it is cured, giving it a fun freshness. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V West Province (Area One) Deli Cioso (after earning 1 Gym Badge ) S V ID Vending machines ( Terarium ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V After School Pokémon Research Club Sandwich Ingredients All December 1, 2022 to January 31, 2023 Poké Times Sandwich Ingredients All December 12-17 to 18, 2022
